reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Suggested renaming the function to better reflect its purpose, which is allocating list_lru heads for folio objects. Also suggested adding a Reviewed-by tag.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new helper function, memcg_list_lru_alloc_folio(), to allocate list_lru heads for folio objects under memory cgroups (memcgs). The function is designed to be lightweight and efficient, allowing it to quickly check if the list_lru heads already exist for the given memcg. If not, it allocates them. This patch is part of a series that aims to switch the THP shrinker to use list_lru.
